name: jira
description: Create and transition Blazemeter MOB Jira tickets — project MOB / board 5348, type Task, Product=Blazemeter, Scrum Team=Terra, active sprint, assignee = the repo owner, status In Review. The ticket summary/name is caller-supplied — reusable by any flow that files a MOB ticket. Supports creating before a PR exists and later updating the description with the PR link.
